summary: V3 Audit Implementation Testing - All Phase 1 (Copy Surgery), Phase 2 (Scroll Animations), and Phase 3 (Visual Components) features verified successfully. Backend API 100% pass. Frontend visual components and animations working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero signal card correctly shows 'Meridian Technologies' with health score countdown (68→47)
'3 signals detected' badge with pulse animation working
3 signal rows with stagger entrance animation present
Hero subheadline trimmed to single paragraph (no subPoints/bullets)
Pattern→Signal word swap animation working on scroll
Navigation 2px gradient scroll progress bar at top of page
Active section highlighting with underline indicator working for Features/HowItWorks/Pricing/FAQ
Problem section signal badges marquee strip with animate-marquee class
3 problem cards with directional entry (left/bottom/right) animations
Problem card bodies trimmed, secondary tags with stagger animation
Reframe section has centered purple glow background (radial-gradient)
Scroll-driven word-by-word reveal working (23 word spans with opacity transition)
Last 8 words in gradient highlight ('seen across your whole portfolio at once.')
'pattern recognition layer' highlighted in gradient in closer
HowItWorks SVG connector line with 3 animated dots
Step numbers have spring entrance animation
Branded gradient icon containers (blue→purple→teal) visible
Outcomes 'Health scores' card featured at lg:col-span-2
Inline SVG bar chart with 5 animated bars (A-E labels, green/amber/red colors)
Tags have typewriter-style stagger reveal
Stats section has SVG radial progress rings (2 circles each)
CTA 'telling a story' highlighted in gradient text
7 particle dots (teal) drifting around CTA button
FounderNote styled placeholder with pulsing red dot (no stock photo)
'Recording coming soon' text with dark gradient background
Early Access Modal opens from all CTA buttons (Hero, Nav, CTA Section)
Form submission works - success state shows 'You're on the list!' with checkmark
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu, overlay nav, signal card adapts
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 audit fully tested. All new visual components working: (1) Hero signal card with Meridian Technologies, health score 47, 3 signals badge with pulse, 3 signal rows with stagger, (2) Pattern→Signal word swap on scroll, (3) 2px gradient progress bar, (4) Active nav underline, (5) Problem signal badges marquee, directional card entry, (6) Reframe scroll word reveal with gradient highlight on last 8 words, (7) HowItWorks connector SVG with 3 dots, spring step numbers, gradient icons, (8) Outcomes featured card lg:col-span-2 with SVG bar chart, scan-line sweep, tag stagger, (9) Stats radial SVG rings, (10) CTA gradient text + 7 particles, (11) FounderNote pulsing red dot placeholder, (12) Modal form submission working. Mobile responsive verified.
passed_tests: Backend API: Root endpoint returns Hello World
Backend API: Duplicate email returns duplicate status
Backend API: Signup with only email works
Hero: '3 signals detected' badge with pulse
Nav: Active section highlighting with underline
Problem: Signal badges marquee strip with animate-marquee
Reframe: Scroll-driven word reveal (23 word spans)
Reframe: Last 8 words in gradient highlight
HowItWorks: SVG connector line with 3 dots
HowItWorks: Spring entrance on step numbers (01, 02, 03)
Outcomes: SVG bar chart with 5 animated bars
Stats: 4 stats with radial SVG progress rings
CTA: 'telling a story' in gradient text
FounderNote: Styled placeholder with pulsing red dot
Mobile: Signal card adapts to width
